tagline: Where Style Meets Precision in Glendale

hero.heading: Premium Barbering. No Compromises.
hero.subheading: Expert haircuts and grooming in Glendale. Built on passion, perfected with skill. Walk-ins welcome.

about.heading: About Hagopart Barbershop
paragraphs: Hagopart Barbershop is a new barbershop in Glendale built on passion and perfected with skill. We believe barbering is not just a job — it's a craft that demands precision, creativity, and respect for every client.
Our team delivers clean cuts, sharp fades, and expert beard work in a modern, welcoming environment. Whether you want a classic look or something bold, we bring the skill to make it happen.

services.title: Precision Haircuts
services.description: Tailored cuts for every style — from classic to contemporary. Each cut is crafted with attention to detail.

services.title: Skin Fades
services.description: Seamless skin fades from bald to high. Clean blending that stands out.

services.title: Beard Grooming
services.description: Professional beard shaping, trimming, and line-ups to keep your facial hair looking sharp.

services.title: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Classic straight razor shave with hot towels for a smooth, refreshing finish.

services.title: Kids Cuts
services.description: Friendly, patient service for younger clients. Fresh cuts for all ages.

services.title: Hair Design
services.description: Custom designs and creative patterns carved with surgical precision.

reviews.name: Aram G.
reviews.text: New shop but incredible quality. The attention to detail is next level. Found my new go-to barbershop.

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Clean fade, great atmosphere, friendly barbers. What more could you ask for?

reviews.name: Tigran M.
reviews.text: These guys are building something special. Skill and passion in every cut. Highly recommend checking them out.

seo.title: Hagopart Barbershop | Premium Barbershop in Glendale CA
seo.description: Hagopart Barbershop in Glendale CA. Expert haircuts, fades, beard grooming, and hot towel shaves. Walk-ins welcome. Call (818) 334-3011.
